nasb.text: And He will judge between many peoples And render decisions for mighty, distant nations. Then they will hammer their swords into plowshares And their spears into pruning hooks; Nation will not lift up sword against nation, And never again will they train for war.

esv.text: He shall judge between many peoples, and shall decide disputes for strong nations far away; and they shall beat their swords into plowshares, and their spears into pruning hooks; nation shall not lift up sword against nation, neither shall they learn war anymore;

cnv.text: “他要在多族中施行審判， 為遠方的強國斷定是非。 他們必把刀劍打成犁頭， 把矛槍打成鐮刀； 這國不舉刀攻擊那國， 他們也不再學習戰事。

ccb.text: 祂要在各民族中施行审判， 为远方的强国断定是非。 他们要把刀剑铸成犁头， 把矛枪打成镰刀。 国与国之间不再动刀枪， 也不再学习战争。
